{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/38071276?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Danny-Devs/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Danny-Devs/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Danny-Devs/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Danny-Devs/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Danny-Devs", "id": 38071276, "login": "Danny-Devs", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjM4MDcxMjc2", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Danny-Devs/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Danny-Devs/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Danny-Devs/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Danny-Devs/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Danny-Devs/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Danny-Devs", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44457", "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-524", "name": "Use of Cache Containing Sensitive Information"}], "description": "### Summary

Cache Middleware does not skip caching for responses that declare per-user variance via `Vary: Authorization` or `Vary: Cookie`. As a result, a response cached for one authenticated user may be served to subsequent requests from different users.

### Details

The Cache Middleware skips caching when a response carries `Vary: *`, certain `Cache-Control` directives (`private`, `no-store`, `no-cache`), or `Set-Cookie`. However, `Vary: Authorization` and `Vary: Cookie` — the standard signals defined in RFC 9110 / RFC 9111 to indicate per-user responses — are not treated as cache-skip reasons.

This issue arises when applications use the Cache Middleware on endpoints that return user-specific data and rely on `Vary: Authorization` or `Vary: Cookie` to scope the response per user, without also setting `Cache-Control: private`.

### Impact

A user may receive a cached response that was originally generated for a different authenticated user. This may lead to:

- Disclosure of personally identifiable information or other user-specific data present in the response body
- Inconsistent or incorrect behavior in user-specific endpoints

This issue affects applications that use the Cache Middleware on endpoints whose responses vary by `Authorization` or `Cookie` and that do not also set `Cache-Control: private`.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00197, "percentile": 0.09561}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-p77w-8qqv-26rm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-09T00:28:46Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p77w-8qqv-26rm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-p77w-8qqv-26rm"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44457"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-13T16:16:57Z", "published_at": "2026-05-09T00:28:46Z", "references": ["https://github.com/honojs/hono/security/advisories/GHSA-p77w-8qqv-26rm", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44457", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p77w-8qqv-26rm"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/honojs/hono/security-advisories/GHSA-p77w-8qqv-26rm", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/honojs/hono", "summary": "Hono's Cache Middleware ignores Vary: Authorization / Vary: Cookie leading to cross-user cache leakage", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-14T20:35:44Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-p77w-8qqv-26rm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.12.18", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "hono"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.12.18"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Hono's Cache Middleware ignores Vary: Authorization / Vary: Cookie leading to cross-user cache leakage
